speaker: charlie
text: G'day from Brisbane, it's Sunday April 26th and you've tuned into ParkSyde Bright Side. I'm Alex Mercer and what a day for good news, eh Jamie?

speaker: alice
text: Too right Alex! We've got scientists literally turning dirt into electricity, graphene that hunts down nasty bacteria like a microscopic bounty hunter, and wait till you hear about this new endangered skink discovery.

speaker: charlie
text: Plus Cricket Australia's gone all space-age with their new app - they're using AI to explain cricket to the rest of us mere mortals. But first, let's dive into some green gold from around the world.
